div.head: The Ambassador in France (Caffery) to the Secretary of State

opener.dateline:
Paris, May 12, 1949—7 p. m.
[Received 9:52 p. m.]

div.p: 1951. We asked BaeyensJacques Baeyens, Head of the Asia–Oceania Section of the French Foreign Office. whether Foreign Office note transmitted Embtel 1941 meant that French intend raise with Secretary whole question of defense SEASoutheast Asia. against Chinese Communists, French military situation in Indochina, our attitude toward Bao DaiHead of French Indochina, former Emperor of Annam. regime, etc. After consulting Parodi,Alexandre Parodi, Secretary General of the French Foreign Office. he has replied in negative saying that present French plans are to confine discussions to eventual recognition Chinese Communist regime in China with particular reference to special French problems arising out of common frontier.
